title: polygala serpyllacea subsp. morisiana
intro: Polygala serpyllacea subsp. morisiana, also known as Chinese milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chinese milkwort include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. Chinese milkwort can be prepared as a tea or an infusion, and it may also be dried and used in herbal remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
